zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Crooke於1590年10月出生在英國英格蘭倫敦福利哈姆時，他的父親John Thomas Crooke23歲，母親Margaret Hawkins22歲。他於1615年2月2日與Millicent Walker在英國英格蘭倫敦維斯特明斯特聖 克萊門特 丹妮絲結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1639年3月2日之前在英國英格蘭倫敦布倫登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Crooke于1590年10月出生在英国英格兰倫敦福利哈姆时，他的父亲John Thomas Crooke23岁，母亲Margaret Hawkins22岁。他于1615年2月2日与Millicent Walker在英国英格兰倫敦維斯特明斯特聖 克萊門特 丹妮絲结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1639年3月2日之前在英国英格兰倫敦布倫登。

nameMeanings.name: Crooke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Crook
meanings: topographic name from Old Norse krókr ‘nook or bend’ denoting someone who lived by a bend in a river or road. In some instances the surname may have arisen as a habitational name from any of the places called Crook in Cumberland and Durham, or Crooke in Lancashire, all of which are derived from this word.

topographic name for someone who lived ‘(at the) barrow or mound’ from Brittonic crüg. In some instances this may have arisen as a habitational name from either Crook in Combe Raleigh or perhaps Crooke in North Tawton (both Devon), which are derived from this word.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Crooke was born in October 1590, in Fulham, London, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Thomas Crooke, was 23 and his mother, Margaret Hawkins, was 22. He married Millicent Walker on 2 February 1615, in St Clement Danes, Westminster, London, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died before 2 March 1639, in Blendon, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Crooke est né en octobre 1590, à Fulham, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Thomas Crooke, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Margaret Hawkins, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Millicent Walker le 2 février 1615, à St Clement Danes, Westminster, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé avant 2 mars 1639, à Blendon, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Crooke(이)가 1590년 10월 영국 잉글랜드 런던 프함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Thomas Crooke(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Hawkins(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1615년 2월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 웨스트민스터 스트 클레멘트 단아네스에서 Millicent Walker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1639년 3월 2일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 런던 블렌던에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Crooke nasceu em outubro de 1590, em Fulham, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Thomas Crooke, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Hawkins, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Millicent Walker em 2 de fevereiro de 1615, em St Clement Danes, Westminster, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu antes 2 de março de 1639, em Blendon, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Crooke родился октябрь 1590 г. в местности фьулхам, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Thomas Crooke было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Hawkins, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Millicent Walker 2 февраля 1615 г. в местности ст клемент данесь, вестминстир, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер перед 2 марта 1639 г. в местности блендон, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger Crooke nació en octubre de 1590, en Fulham, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Thomas Crooke, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Margaret Hawkins, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Millicent Walker el 2 de febrero de 1615, en St Clement Danes, Westminster, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió antes de 2 de marzo de 1639, en Blendon, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
